productName: Incredibulk - IB PHO 1g - SATIVA - Ghost Train Haze - 1g
description: Classic sativa BHO crafted from Ghost Train Haze — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Smooth and high-potency, with notes of citrus, sage, and lime, leading into an upbeat, talkative energy.
